data.title: Zscaler Q1 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, New AI Opportunities, Shares Slide
data.description: Zscaler reported first-quarter revenue of $628 million, beating the consensus estimate of $606.19 million. The cybersecurity company reported adjusted earnings of 77 cents per share, beating analyst estimates of 63 cents per share, according to Benzinga Pro.

data.title: Wall Street Loses Iconic Voice: Art Cashin Dies At 83
data.description: Art Cashin, legendary director of floor operations at UBS and a revered figure at NYSE, passed away at 83. He was known for his market insights and storytelling prowess.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Dip, But Trader Predicts $100,000 Bitcoin Breakout Followed By 20-25% Correction
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are trading lower on Monday, with selected altcoins recording significant gains.

data.title: Crypto-Related Shares Fall Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Shares of crypto-linked companies Hut 8, MARA Holdings and Riot Platforms are trading lower Monday as Bitcoin experiences a pullback after its recent rise near $100,000. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: University Of Utah's Course On Cannabis And Feminism Explores Assumptions Around Marijuana And More
data.description: The University of Utah's Feminist Cannabis Studies course explores cannabis history, culture, and inequality through a feminist lens.
